narrative:
Hill 1-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 637 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a modest Republican lean of 4.4 percentage points.
